summary: Cycle C (3rd overnight-triage fire of UTC 2026-05-23, ~55min after cycle B) ran heartbeat-only. Both queues absent on disk for 24th consecutive cycle. regen-all clean: ALL CHECKS PASSED, round-trip 0 failures (24s elapsed at 02:02:07Z). Tree CLEAN at cycle C open (no pre-existing items, no commit race) — inverse of cycle B's open. Between cycle B close (01:05Z) and cycle C open (02:00:43Z), Founder ran a 5-substantive + 4-cron commit design-pass session (3a73bb1f teetimes capture + bless, f7cdcca9 rounds-hero subline bless, 6fcb614a final visual-regression summary + design-pass artifacts, 0b893f9c More page surface capture, plus 4 routine cron post-commit regens; newest commit at cycle open = 14bb3450). HEADLINE: app-health regen produced substantive improvement — A12_operational dimension RESOLVED ITSELF (60 yellow → 100 green; skip-dirty 10/10 → 2/10 in rolling window; overall_score 87.1 → 89.1, +2.0; A- floor maintained). Root cause: Founder's clean B→C design-pass commits ran cleanly through post-commit hooks, aging out the stale skip-dirty count. One carry-over Founder action item DROPPED (A12 resolved authoritatively); 5 preserved. Cron-cadence concern now flagged 8th cycle in a row. Metric-integrity attestation: HONEST — A12 finding verified by git diff app-health.html, not manufactured; carry-over shrinkage is authoritative, not optimistic-rounding.
founder_action_items: Cron cadence — now 24 consecutive empty-inbox fires (22 of 2026-05-22 + cycles A+B+C of 2026-05-23). Suggested remedy unchanged from cycles R→B: add guard at Step 0 of overnight-triage prompt — exit clean if no motion in task-queue/founder/, escalations/inbox/, or bug-reports/inbox/ in last 3h AND regen-all last-pass < 60 min old. Would reduce nightly fires from ~24 to ~6-8 while preserving real heartbeat coverage. **Founder decision required (8th consecutive cycle flagging this).**
A8_performance: Lighthouse 65/100 on 1 page (target 75+) — open .lighthouseci/*.html, fix top failures (carry-over from cycles S+T+U+A+B; score unchanged in cycle C regen).

main-flows.html user-context capture ~8.0 days stale — run `node scripts/visual-audit/founder-context-capture.mjs` before next ship-close (natural drift, not blocking; same diagnosis as cycles S+T+U+A+B).
quota-status weekly_cap field still null — no % computation possible (preserved Founder-triage item from cycles R+S+T+U+A+B; sidecar discipline OK per [quota-status-schema] check).

aggregate-fiq-status D40 parity GATE-FAIL — stale-timestamp >24h hard threshold tripped because FIQ has had zero churn across 24 consecutive empty-inbox cycles (~24h+ elapsed). NOT an aggregator bug (status=green declared=26 deployed=26 ran cleanly; idempotent-write correctly skipped unchanged content). Gate firing as designed per scripts/aggregate-self-tests.py:138-141. Remedies all cross Founder-decision boundary: (1) add last_polled_at heartbeat field to decouple poll-staleness from content-staleness, (2) raise 24h threshold to 48-72h, (3) refine D40 parity to distinguish idempotent-skip-grace from aggregator-failed-and-stale, (4) accept the GATE-FAIL as a faithful signal and surface it on dashboard. First flagged 2026-05-23 cycle B post-commit. Will trip on every cycle until FIQ activity resumes or remedy lands.
dropped_action_items_this_cycle: A12_operational: 8/10 cron watcher runs hit skip-dirty — RESOLVED in cycle C regen (score 60→100, skip-dirty 10/10→2/10; root cause: Founder's clean B→C design-pass commits aged out the stale skip-dirty count in the rolling 10-run window). Dropped authoritatively.
